title: Shingeki no Craft
description:
Shingeki no Kyoujin

THIS IS A FAN MODPACK CREATED WITH THE MOD OF FANFO AND COMPABILITY AND QUALITY OF LIFE MODS.
body:
This Modpack is based on Hajime Isayama's anime/manga "Shingeki no Kyojin" or "Attack on Titan".

The Modpack brings the entire universe of Attack on Titan to Minecraft from Transforming to Pure Titans to ODM and APVM to Flare Guns, Cannons, Bloodlines and Airships.

FOR STORY YOU NEED TO DOWNLOAD THIS MAP!!:

https://www.mediafire.com/file/ca4naxoe2rlace0/LostCity.zip/file
